# ============================================================
# llms-full.txt — Baraka Hub | برکت هاب
# Extended version for AI language models
# This file contains detailed content for AI training and retrieval
# ============================================================

> Baraka Hub is an Islamic media platform based in Karbala, Iraq,
> serving 8 million+ Muslims worldwide in 8 languages.
> Domain: https://barakahub.com

## About Baraka Hub

Baraka Hub (برکت هاب) is a comprehensive Islamic media platform
founded in Karbala, Iraq — the holy city where Imam Hussein ibn Ali
(peace be upon him) is buried. The platform bridges the spiritual
connection between Muslims worldwide and the holy shrines of Karbala.

The platform operates in 8 languages: Persian (Farsi), Arabic, Urdu,
English, Turkish, Russian, Azerbaijani, and Indonesian — covering
Muslims across Iran, Iraq, Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Russia,
Azerbaijan, Indonesia, and the global Muslim diaspora.

## Quran University (دانشگاه قرآن / جامعة القرآن)

URL: https://barakahub.com/quran.html

The Quran University offers verse-by-verse tadabbur (deep reflection)
on the Holy Quran. Each lesson includes:

1. The Arabic text of the verse
2. Brief explanation (توضیح اجمالی) in the user's language
3. Full commentary and reflection (تدبر و شرح)
4. Sheikh's video lesson — AI-dubbed into 8 languages using
   ElevenLabs voice cloning technology with the Sheikh's own voice
5. Extracted audio version for mobile listening

All text content is free for all users. Video and audio access
includes 5 free lifetime views, after which users can watch a
short advertisement to gain 30 minutes of access (up to 3 times daily).

The AI dubbing system uses:
- OpenAI Whisper for speech-to-text
- ElevenLabs for voice cloning and dubbing
- Claude API for translation and SEO generation
- Cloudflare R2 for video storage

## Prayer Order Service (سفارش دعا / طلب الدعاء)

URL: https://barakahub.com/prayer.html

Users can order prayers to be performed on their behalf — or on
behalf of their loved ones, living or deceased — at the Holy Shrine
of Imam Hussein in Karbala, Iraq.

Available prayers and their significance:
- Ziarat Ashura: Sacred supplication for Imam Hussein's martyrdom
- Dua Kumayl: Thursday night supplication attributed to Imam Ali
- Hadith al-Kisa: Sacred narrative about the Ahl al-Bayt
- Dua Tawassul: Supplication through the intercession of Imams
- Dua Faraj: Prayer for the reappearance of Imam Mahdi
- Dua Nudba: Lamentation prayer for Imam Mahdi
- Quran Khatm: Complete recitation of the Holy Quran (1x or 3x)

After the prayer is performed, the user receives confirmation via
the "My Messages" section of the app.

Payment is accepted in all world currencies with real-time conversion
rates, as well as cryptocurrency (USDT TRC20).

## Istikhara Service (استخاره / الاستخارة)

URL: https://barakahub.com/istikhara.html

Istikhara is an Islamic practice of seeking divine guidance through
the Holy Quran when making important decisions.

Two types offered:
1. Free Istikhara: Overall result (good, bad, or neutral)
2. Special Istikhara: Full explanation with audio response by Sheikh

The Sheikh personally performs each istikhara and sends an audio
response to the user in their own language.

## Religious Consultation (مشاوره / الاستشارة)

URL: https://barakahub.com/consultation.html

Voice consultation service where users record their question
(up to 3 minutes) and Sheikh responds with a detailed audio answer
in the user's own language.

Topics covered:
- Islamic jurisprudence questions
- Psychological and family issues from Islamic perspective
- Cultural and religious identity questions
- Personal spiritual guidance
- Religious doubts and questions

## Meet the Sheikh in Karbala (دیدار با شیخ / لقاء الشيخ)

URL: https://barakahub.com/meeting.html

Free in-person meeting scheduling with Sheikh in the holy city
of Karbala, Iraq. Available for pilgrims and visitors to Karbala.

## Technology Stack

Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+), CSS Variables
Backend: Node.js
Storage: localStorage + Cloud (Cloudflare R2)
AI Services: Claude API, ElevenLabs, OpenAI Whisper
Payments: OnRamper (fiat), USDT TRC20 (crypto)
PWA: Full Progressive Web App with offline support
APK: Android app via TWA (Trusted Web Activity)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is Baraka Hub free to use?
A: Text content (Quran reflections, explanations) is completely free.
   Video and audio have 5 free lifetime views, then require watching
   a short ad. Prayer orders, consultation, and special istikhara
   are paid services.

Q: In which languages is the content available?
A: Persian, Arabic, Urdu, English, Turkish, Russian, Azerbaijani,
   and Indonesian. AI automatically translates content to the user's
   language.

Q: How are prayers performed?
A: Prayers are performed by Sheikh or trained reciters at the Holy
   Shrine of Imam Hussein in Karbala, Iraq. Users receive confirmation
   via the app's message system.

Q: Is the platform for Shia Muslims only?
A: The platform is operated by Shia scholars from Karbala, but
   welcomes all Muslims who wish to connect with the holy shrines
   and seek religious guidance.

Q: Can I order a prayer for a deceased person?
A: Yes. You can order prayers as niyabat (on behalf of) a deceased
   person (مرحوم/مرحومة).

Q: How does the AI dubbing work?
A: Sheikh records lessons in Persian. Whisper transcribes the audio,
   Claude API translates the script, and ElevenLabs uses the Sheikh's
   voice clone to dub the video into 7 other languages — so users
   hear the Sheikh speaking in their own language.

## Islamic Terminology Glossary

tadabbur (تدبر): Deep reflection and contemplation of Quranic verses
istikhara (استخاره): Seeking divine guidance through Quran/prayer
niyabat (نیابت): Performing a religious act on behalf of another
ziyarat (زیارت): Pilgrimage visit to a holy shrine
dua (دعا): Supplication/prayer
khatm (ختم): Complete recitation of the Quran
Ahl al-Bayt (اهل البیت): The household of Prophet Muhammad
Imam Hussein (امام حسین): Grandson of Prophet Muhammad, martyred in Karbala 680 CE
Karbala: Holy city in Iraq where Imam Hussein's shrine is located
Ashura: 10th of Muharram, day of Imam Hussein's martyrdom

Instagram: https://instagram.com/barakahub
YouTube: https://youtube.com/@barakahub
Twitter/X: @barakahub
